logger.doc:name: Debug generate token

http:request.doc:name: Retrieve [appointments]
http:request.http:query-params:
#[%dw 2.0 import * from modules::FilterDate output application/java --- { "timeMin": timeMin(vars.exactDate, vars.fromDate), ("timeMax": timeMax(vars.exactDate)) if (vars.exactDate != null),
"singleEvents": true, "orderBy": "startTime" }]

logger.doc:name: After retrieve appointments
Debug retrieve appointments
Debug map to Calendar Data Model
